title: desmodium elegans var. handelii
intro: Desmodium elegans var. handelii, also known as Handel's tick trefoil or Handel's tick clover, is a plant species native to South Africa, belonging to the legume family Fabaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are attributed to its high concentration of flavonoids and saponins. The plant is said to offer various health benefits, including reducing fever, treating wounds and skin conditions, and aiding in the management of gastrointestinal issues. In traditional herbal medicine, Desmodium elegans var. handelii is often prepared as an infusion or decoction, and can also be used in the form of a topical cream or ointment to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
